source.source_rationale: The core limb bud mesenchyme expresses SOX9 to specify the osteo-chondrogenic lineage and generate the primordial cartilage template.

We found three PRRX1+ limb bud mesenchymal subsets (LBM1–3) that mainly exist in 5 WPC limb buds (clusters 1–3), which differentially expressed PDGFRA, reflecting mesenchymal progenitors at different maturation stages

We found three PRRX1+ limb bud mesenchymal subsets (LBM1–3) that mainly exist in 5 WPC limb buds (clusters 1–3), which differentially expressed PDGFRA, reflecting mesenchymal progenitors at different maturation stages

We found three PRRX1+ limb bud mesenchymal subsets (LBM1–3) that mainly exist in 5 WPC limb buds (clusters 1–3), which differentially expressed PDGFRA, reflecting mesenchymal progenitors at different maturation stages

Notably, cluster 4 is a mesenchymal subset that equally distributed between limb bud and long bone samples, which expressed PRRX1, low level of SOX9 and the highest level of PDGFRA, reminiscent of osteo-chondrogenic progenitors (OCPs) that give rise to long bones

Notably, cluster 4 is a mesenchymal subset that equally distributed between limb bud and long bone samples, which expressed PRRX1, low level of SOX9 and the highest level of PDGFRA, reminiscent of osteo-chondrogenic progenitors (OCPs) that give rise to long bones

Notably, cluster 4 is a mesenchymal subset that equally distributed between limb bud and long bone samples, which expressed PRRX1, low level of SOX9 and the highest level of PDGFRA, reminiscent of osteo-chondrogenic progenitors (OCPs) that give rise to long bones
Of the two epithelial subsets (Fig. 2a), only cluster 9 (corresponds to Epithelium 1, Fig. 1c, d) highly expressed AER marker FGF8, consistent with previous study in mouse embryos.

We found that LBM3 preferentially expressed 3′ HOX genes such as HOX2–6, while LBM1 and LBM2 preferentially expressed 5’ HOX genes such as HOX9–11, suggesting that they represented proximal (LBM3) and distal (LBM1 and LBM2) mesenchymal cells, respectively (Fig. 2f).

We found that LBM3 preferentially expressed 3′ HOX genes such as HOX2–6, while LBM1 and LBM2 preferentially expressed 5’ HOX genes such as HOX9–11, suggesting that they represented proximal (LBM3) and distal (LBM1 and LBM2) mesenchymal cells, respectively (Fig. 2f).

We found that LBM3 preferentially expressed 3′ HOX genes such as HOX2–6, while LBM1 and LBM2 preferentially expressed 5’ HOX genes such as HOX9–11, suggesting that they represented proximal (LBM3) and distal (LBM1 and LBM2) mesenchymal cells, respectively (Fig. 2f).
Cluster 1 highly expressed CXCL12 and PDGFRA (Supplementary information, Fig. S3b and Table S1), which are classical markers of BMSCs.
Cluster 1 highly expressed CXCL12 and PDGFRA (Supplementary information, Fig. S3b and Table S1), which are classical markers of BMSCs.
Cluster 2 highly expressed limb bud mesenchymal genes such as TWIST2 [...]
Cluster 3 highly expressed GAS2 and localized in the center of all OCLC subsets

Clustering analysis revealed two distinct subsets, including 93.3% eSSPCs that expressed FOXP1, FOXP2 and GAS2, and 6.7% Schwann cells that expressed SOX2, SOX10 and MPZ (Supplementary information, Fig. S5a, b).

Clustering analysis revealed two distinct subsets, including 93.3% eSSPCs that expressed FOXP1, FOXP2 and GAS2, and 6.7% Schwann cells that expressed SOX2, SOX10 and MPZ (Supplementary information, Fig. S5a, b).

Clustering analysis revealed two distinct subsets, including 93.3% eSSPCs that expressed FOXP1, FOXP2 and GAS2, and 6.7% Schwann cells that expressed SOX2, SOX10 and MPZ (Supplementary information, Fig. S5a, b).
(1) NGFR+ cranial neural crest (NC) cells (cluster 1) that highly expressed NES

(2) two GJA1+ subsets including vascular leptomeningeal cells (cluster 2, VLMCs) that highly expressed SLC6A13 and PTGDS,78 and migratory NC (mig_NC) cells that expressed higher level of BMP4 (cluster 3)

(2) two GJA1+ subsets including vascular leptomeningeal cells (cluster 2, VLMCs) that highly expressed SLC6A13 and PTGDS,78 and migratory NC (mig_NC) cells that expressed higher level of BMP4 (cluster 3)

(3) neural crest-derived cells (cluster 4, NCDC) that highly expressed BMP4 and FOXC2
(3) neural crest-derived cells (cluster 4, NCDC) that highly expressed BMP4 and FOXC2
(4) RUNX2+ osteoprogenitors (cluster 5) that highly expressed osteogenic factors DLX5 and CLEC11A
(4) RUNX2+ osteoprogenitors (cluster 5) that highly expressed osteogenic factors DLX5 and CLEC11A
(5) two OSR2+ PMSC subsets (clusters 6 and 7) that highly expressed POSTN
(6) SOX9+ chondrocytes that highly expressed COL9A2 (cluster 8)
PDGFRB+ pericytes that highly expressed MCAM and ACTA2
PDGFRB+ pericytes that highly expressed MCAM and ACTA2
